series_metadata.series_title: Equal Employment Opportunity Applicant and New Hire Reports
series_metadata.series_description: Reports run to fulfill Department of Justice reporting requirements as well as for internal use. The reports can include statistics on the number and employment classifications of applicants and new hires, and are often categorized by gender, reace, disability, veteran status, age, and position classification.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: , provided audited ; Paper: no longer of administrative value
